name: Category 23: Reporting & Analytics
description: Comprehensive reporting and analytics automations for service businesses

automations.name: Daily Revenue Snapshot
automations.description: Generates daily revenue report from completed jobs and payments

config.query: SELECT SUM(amount) as total_revenue, COUNT(*) as transaction_count, DATE(created_at) as date FROM payments WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE(created_at)

config.code: const revenue = data[0]; return { totalRevenue: revenue.total_revenue, transactionCount: revenue.transaction_count, date: revenue.date, avgTransaction: revenue.total_revenue / revenue.transaction_count }

automations.name: KPI Dashboard Data Collector
automations.description: Collects and aggregates KPI data for dashboard visualization

config.code: return { revenue: await db.query('SELECT SUM(amount) FROM payments WHERE created_at > NOW() - interval 30 days'), jobsCompleted: await db.query('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jobs WHERE status = completed AND updated_at > NOW() - interval 30 days'), clientCount: await db.query('SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT client_id) FROM jobs WHERE created_at > NOW() - interval 30 days') }

automations.name: Client ROI Report Generator
automations.description: Generates ROI reports for individual clients

config.query: SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM jobs WHERE created_at > NOW() - interval 90 days
INSERT INTO reports (type, date, data) VALUES ('client_roi', CURRENT_DATE, $1)
